items: might be some useful info in there
set the height/width to a custom value and auto for the other
When fancybox opens it sets the body's height to auto with a class 'fancybox-active', which overrides the heigh: 100%,
Since html has height 100% and overflow: hidden it doesn't scroll
body doesn't have a set height anymore so neither do its children
the content wrapper loses its scroll because the body doesn't have it
the page moves the viewport up because all the scrolling is gone
dont use height option on fancybox, set a min height in the popup itself
cant just have random text anywhere, have to have it wrapped in an element otherwise the height cannot be calculated properly and creates scrolling for > 1 px overflow or something like that
fancybox doesn't like fully qualified urls for carousel - check InvoiceDetails click on image thumbnails on mobile friendly

rows.c2: use to refresh a fancybox after adding/removing content and make it adjust height to fit
close a fancybox while in it
close the fancybox and redirect to URL (from controller)
